[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11101110 6
2 11111110 7
3 01111110 6
4 01111110 6
5 01111110 6
6 10100011 4
7 11101010 5

23 32 10100010 3
34 43 11101010 5 match 7

56 65 00001000 1
67 76 00111000 3
70 07 01111100 5

13 31 00101010 3
24 42 10100010 3

50 05 00001110 3

37 73 01101000 3
